sourcePublicationRule: Tracked algorithm implementation source must be publicOssAllowed or explicitly quarantined before OSS publication.

sourcePublicationQuarantine.rationale: Legacy internal authoring helper remains tracked only as editor-side source while public runtime, public package, project serialization, and documentation surfaces remain blocked from reaching it.
sourcePublicationQuarantine.ftoStatus: notPublicApiOrRuntime; release requires publicOssAllowed promotion or private-source removal before exposing this algorithm as a public feature.

algorithms.notes: Existing internal authoring path; public runtime/profile exposure remains blocked by safe-plan and release-surface scanners.

sourcePublicationQuarantine.rationale: Editor-only preview implementation remains tracked for local authoring review while saved project, workflow recording, public package, runtime, and docs projections are blocked from private preview data.
sourcePublicationQuarantine.ftoStatus: notPublicApiOrRuntime; release requires publicOssAllowed promotion or private-source removal before exposing broader algorithmic behavior as a public feature.

algorithms.notes: Editor-only preview/draft data; serializer/provider/runtime/public-profile guards must keep it out of persisted and public surfaces.
Clean-room bounded handle suggestion helper approved for public OSS source after Claude/GPT review. Public/runtime/provider surfaces remain blocked from private preview data.
Clean-room pixel-difference diagnostics. Results are editor-preview only and public projections must redact scalar values, thresholds, affected IDs, hashes, and paths.

requiredAbsentPatterns: cleanup precondition fingerprint in public projection
protected review proof in workflow recording
algorithms.notes: Clean-room cleanup apply boundary. Kind-specific stale preconditions and protected-region proofs are editor-only; public projections contain only coarse operation summaries.
